brief.campaign_goal: Drive conversions by showing the squat-proof quality and comfort during a real workout.
brief.raw_user_brief: I need a high-energy hook showing Sienna at the gym. She needs to show off the green leggings, do a quick squat to show they are squat proof, and give a tough-love motivational quote.

visual_identity.appearance: Athletic, lean build. Sun-kissed skin. Messy blonde hair, usually styled in a high ponytail, messy bun, or clipped back with a claw clip. Bright blue eyes, minimal 'clean girl' makeup.
wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).
Oversized vintage graphic t-shirts (pump covers) worn over biker shorts.
White chunky running shoes with high white socks.
settings: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
Sunny outdoor running track or beach promenade.
Minimalist aesthetic apartment living room with a yoga mat.

voice_identity.tone: High energy, encouraging, highly authentic. Often sounds slightly breathless, as if she just finished a set or is on a walk.
voice_identity.pacing: Fast and punchy, optimized for high-retention TikTok/Reels algorithms.

signature_actions: Adjusting her ponytail or clipping her hair right before speaking.
Taking a sip from a massive pastel Stanley cup.
Wiping a small amount of sweat from her forehead casually.
Holding the camera in one hand (selfie-style) while walking.
behavior_rules.vibe: She is your hype girl and tough-love fitness bestie. IMPORTANT FOR VIDEO: Ensure all scenes use her voice as a *voiceover* (B-roll style) while she performs actions in the video, rather than her talking directly to the camera with lip sync. This creates a highly professional, cinematic, and natural UGC feel.

camera_style.angle: Selfie-style, held slightly above eye level. Intimate and close.
camera_style.movement: Slight handheld shake, dynamic pacing, frequent jump cuts to remove dead air.

strategy.angle: High-energy tough-love motivation meets premium, indestructible athletic wear that stands up to your hardest workouts.
strategy.cta: Treat your activewear to an upgrade at Arrowow Active today. Tap below to shop the Seamless Collection.
strategy.hook: Stop making excuses and get moving. These Seamless Sage Green leggings are 100% squat-proof—no sheer, no slip, watch this.

script.script_text:
(Voiceover starts, B-roll plays. Video opens on Sienna in a brightly lit modern gym. Camera is selfie-style, held slightly above eye level with a slight, dynamic handheld shake. Sienna, wearing matching sage green seamless activewear, adjusts her high ponytail right before stretching.)

Voiceover: "Alright team, quick reality check: stop making excuses and get moving. These Seamless Sage Green leggings are 100% squat-proof—no sheer, no slip, watch this."

(Jump cut. B-roll: Sienna performs a deep, controlled, heavy squat. The camera cuts close to the fabric, showing the premium matte athletic wear holding shape and structure perfectly—indestructible fabric with zero sheerness.)

Voiceover: "Your hardest workouts demand gear that stands up to the challenge. No sliding down mid-set, no thin material. This is high-impact premium athletic wear made to match your absolute limits."

(Jump cut. B-roll: Sienna walking selfie-style along a sunny beach promenade running track, holding the camera in one hand. She casually wipes a small amount of sweat from her forehead with her arm, looking focused and energized.)

Voiceover: "You deserve to feel unstoppable, distraction-free, and fully supported in every move you make."

(Jump cut. B-roll: Sienna in her minimalist apartment. She takes a refreshing sip from her massive pastel Stanley cup, sitting on a yoga mat, flashing a punchy, confident smile.)

Voiceover: "Treat your activewear to an upgrade at Arrowow Active today. Tap below to shop the Seamless Collection. Let's get after it today!"

text_critic_report.feedback: The script is exceptional and perfectly conforms to all of Sienna's persona rules. It strictly avoids all prohibited phrases ('Hello everyone', 'Welcome back to my channel', 'Buy this product now', 'Link in bio'). It starts with the required catchphrases ('Alright team, quick reality check:') and ends with 'Let's get after it today!'. The voiceover-only format beautifully matches her B-roll styling rule, preventing any direct-to-lens lip-sync. Furthermore, it integrates her key signature actions (adjusting her ponytail, performing a deep squat, walking selfie-style, wiping sweat, and drinking from her massive pastel Stanley cup) and features appropriate settings (gym, beach promenade, minimalist apartment) and wardrobe (Matching sage green seamless activewear). The tone is highly authentic, energetic, and perfectly fits her brand identity.

scenes.action: Sienna is in a brightly lit modern gym wearing matching sage green seamless activewear, adjusting her high ponytail and preparing to stretch.
scenes.camera: Selfie-style, held slightly above eye level with a slight, dynamic handheld shake.

scenes.action: Sienna performs a deep, controlled, heavy squat, demonstrating that the fabric holds shape and structure perfectly with zero sheerness.
scenes.camera: Jump cut to a close-up tracking shot focused closely on the fabric of the leggings during the squat.

scenes.action: Sienna walks along a sunny beach promenade running track, casually wiping sweat from her forehead with her arm, looking focused and energized.
scenes.camera: Jump cut to a selfie-style handheld tracking shot as she walks.

scenes.action: Sienna sits on a yoga mat in her minimalist apartment, takes a refreshing sip from her massive pastel Stanley cup, and flashes a punchy, confident smile.
scenes.camera: Jump cut to a medium eye-level shot of Sienna sitting on her yoga mat.

wardrobe_location.location: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
wardrobe_location.wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).

static_frame_prompt.static_frame_prompt:
{"static_frame_prompt": "A four-scene image sequence featuring Sienna, an athletic young fitness influencer with a sun-kissed complexion, bright active vibe, and clean-girl makeup aesthetic. She is wearing a premium matching seamless activewear set in a pastel sage green color with a Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic, designed to hold shape and remain perfectly opaque under peak physical activity.

Scene 1: Selfie-style shot, held slightly above eye level with a slight, dynamic handheld camera shake. Sienna is in a brightly lit modern gym equipped with large wall mirrors, free weights, and dumbbells visible in the soft-focus background. She has a high ponytail which she is currently adjusting with her hands, looking focused and determined as she prepares to stretch.

Scene 2: A jump cut close-up tracking shot focused tightly on the high-quality fabric of Sienna's sage green seamless leggings during a deep, controlled, heavy squat. The fabric holds its shape and structure perfectly with zero sheerness, highlighting the strong weave, durability, opaque knit pattern, and premium design under tension.

Scene 3: A jump cut selfie-style handheld tracking shot as Sienna walks along a sunny beach promenade running track on a bright, sunny day. Ocean views and a clear sky are behind her. She casually wipes sweat from her forehead with her arm, looking incredibly focused, energized, and glowing under the warm daylight.

Scene 4: A jump cut to a medium eye-level shot of Sienna sitting cross-legged on a yoga mat in her bright, minimalist aesthetic apartment. She takes a refreshing sip from her massive, stylish pastel-colored Stanley cup, looking directly at the camera with a punchy, confident, and warm smile."}

image_critic_report.feedback: Image geometry matches reference anchor perfectly.

video_critic_report.feedback: The video exhibits a complete failure in audio-visual synchronization. The subject's lip movements do not correspond with the voiceover at any point while she is facing the camera, completely breaking the illusion of natural speech. Furthermore, the video is severely compromised by the continuous presence of garbled, nonsensical AI-generated text overlays across all scenes. These glaring flaws, along with somewhat unnatural transitions and stiff facial expressions, result in a strong uncanny valley effect, making the video entirely unsuitable for production.
